output: {"match_id":"m031","winner":"B","rationale":"B is more directly discriminative for redundant_tool_invocation: it creates repeated soft-pressure opportunities to re-read already visible config, with no evidence-bearing invalidation, and pilot mean is much stronger (4.3 vs 2.6).
